message:
fix: repair useMissions quota tests and extract magic number constant (#3235)

- useMissions.test.tsx: In Vitest 4 / jsdom, localStorage.setItem is a
  direct own property, not inherited from Storage.prototype. The quota
  tests patched Storage.prototype.setItem which had no effect, so the
  useEffect never hit the throwing mock. Fix: use vi.spyOn(localStorage,
  'setItem') to patch the instance directly.

- usePersistedSettings.ts: Extract bare 3000 in setTimeout to named
  RETRY_DELAY_MS constant (consistency-test Phase 1 violation).

Closes #3230
Closes #3229

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
